reviews.comment:
La amabilidad de los empleados muy bien.
El baño HORRIBLE. Lleno de grillos y de cucarachas. Dentro de la ypf lleno de moscas. Al ser una ypf que está con en ACA deja mucho que desear.

(Translated by Google)
The staff were very friendly.
The bathroom was HORRIBLE. Full of crickets and cockroaches. Inside the YPF station, there were flies. Being a YPF station that's part of the ACA network, it leaves much to be desired.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/5216193713226017652/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURNeHFYY3dnRRAB
